name: Jellied Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the graham crackers and mix with sugar and melted butter. Press into bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside remaining mixture.
2. Mix gelatin with water and let soak for 5 minutes.
3. Drain pineapple and add enough milk to make 2 cups. Heat in saucepan.
4. Add dissolved gelatin to the saucepan and mix until smooth.
5. Combine custard powder with 1/4 cup milk, then stir into saucepan. Stir constantly until thickened.
6. Mix cheese and pineapple into cooled mixture.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff. Beat in sugar.
8. Whip cream and fold into cheese mixture with beaten egg whites.
9. Pour into crust and sprinkle top with remaining crumb mixture. Refrigerate until firm.
10. Serve garnished with sweetened whipped cream and chopped crystallized ginger. Serves 8.
